name: Iter15 — Skeleton loading: no spinner, review completes
description: Verify that no old-style spinner appears while loading and that the skeleton placeholder is replaced by a full review report.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/OWASP/NodeGoat/pull/300 in the PR URL input field
There is no spinning SVG spinner visible — instead gray pulsing placeholder blocks OR the final review result is shown (either skeleton or completed report is acceptable)
Wait up to 90 seconds for the review report to fully appear
A review report is visible with a numeric score, a verdict badge, and category cards — no skeleton blocks remain
